title: Peyritschia eriantha
intro: Peyritschia eriantha is a species of flowering plant in the family Poaceae, commonly known as a type of grass. The plant is believed to possess health benefits, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which may aid in reducing inflammation and improving overall well-being. Bioactive constituents of Peyritschia eriantha include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and alkaloids, which contribute to its medicinal properties. The plant is used to make various herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and extracts, which are often used to support immune function and alleviate symptoms of respiratory issues.
taxonomy: Peyritschia eriantha is classified within the family Poaceae. This family is commonly known as the grass family. Peyritschia eriantha further belongs to the subfamily Pooideae. Within the subfamily Pooideae, Peyritschia eriantha is a member of the tribe Poeae. Peyritschia eriantha is a genus of grasses within the tribe Poeae.
